site.title: International Economy Times
site.subtitle: International Economy Times
site.description: Global Vision · Financial Authority · GBA Focus · ESG & Green Finance · AI Data Intelligence

hero.title: AI Sentiment & Big Data Center
hero.subtitle: Powered by AI and big data to provide global financial sentiment monitoring, intelligent alerts, data verification, and enterprise risk profiling.

monitoring.title: Real-time Sentiment Monitoring
monitoring.desc: 24/7 global financial sentiment tracking across over a million media sources.

alert.title: Intelligent Alert System
alert.desc: AI-driven anomaly alerts with customizable thresholds and notifications.

verification.title: Data Verification
verification.desc: Cross-source validation to detect misinformation and abnormal data.

riskProfile.title: Enterprise Risk Profiling
riskProfile.desc: Multi-dimensional profiling across ESG rating, sentiment heat, and credit risk.

subscription.title: Enterprise Subscription
subscription.desc: Customized reports, industry briefs, and dedicated data API services.

macroData.title: Macro Data Center
macroData.desc: Visualization and comparative analysis of key indicators such as GDP, CPI, and PMI.

cta.title: Need Customized Data Services?
cta.subtitle: We provide dedicated analytics and sentiment monitoring solutions for financial institutions, listed companies, and public agencies.

hero.title: Events & Activity Center
hero.subtitle: Bringing you premium event insights on global economy forums, ESG summits, roadshows, and industry expos.

esgSummit.title: 2026 Global ESG Summit
esgSummit.desc: Gathering global ESG experts to discuss latest trends and practical cases.

gbaForum.title: GBA Economic Forum
gbaForum.desc: In-depth discussion on regional synergy, cross-border finance, and industry cooperation in the GBA.

greenRoadshow.title: Green Finance Investment Roadshow
greenRoadshow.desc: Project matchmaking for selected green bonds and carbon finance products.

aiSeminar.title: AI-Powered Financial Media Seminar
aiSeminar.desc: Exploring AI applications in financial journalism, sentiment analysis, and data visualization.

introduction.p1: International Economy Times is a comprehensive financial media platform focused on global economy, financial markets, ESG, and sustainability. We uphold authority, professionalism, depth, and global vision to serve decision-makers across government, business, academia, and research.
introduction.p2: The platform covers nine major channels including News Center, GBA & Hong Kong Finance, ESG & Sustainability, Green Finance, AI Big Data Center, Think Tank, Events, Supervision & Integrity, and Brand Services, spanning core areas such as macro economy, global finance, financial markets, industry, and international trade.

values.title: Editorial Philosophy
values.desc: We adhere to professional journalism with objective, fair, and independent reporting to support economic decisions with quality content.

direction.title: Development Direction
direction.desc: Focused on ESG, green finance, and AI big data to build an integrated platform of media, think tank, data, and services.

core.title: Core Values
core.desc: Authoritative voice, in-depth analysis, global vision, and innovation-driven development.

mission.title: Service Mission
mission.desc: Providing accurate information support and professional consulting services to institutions and enterprises.

legal.title: Legal Notice & Disclaimer
legal.copyrightText: All content on this website, including text, images, audio, video, software, programs, and web layout design, is protected by copyright and relevant laws. No entity or individual may reproduce, copy, quote, link, scrape, or otherwise use without written authorization.
legal.disclaimerText: All information on this website is for reference only and does not constitute investment advice. We are not liable for any direct or indirect losses arising from the use of website materials.
legal.privacyText: We value user privacy. We only collect the minimum data necessary to provide services and do not sell or share personal data with third parties unless required by law.

hero.title: Global Financial News at Your Fingertips
hero.subtitle: Focused on ESG & Sustainability, Green Finance, GBA Economy, AI Big Data

about.title: About Us
about.description: International Economy Times (WorldnPress) is a professional news platform focused on global finance, ESG sustainability, green finance, GBA economy, and AI sentiment big data, dedicated to becoming an authoritative international economic news portal.

legal.title: Compliance Disclosure
legal.disclaimer: All materials and information published on this website are for reference only. This website shall not be liable for any direct or indirect losses arising from the use of materials on this website.
legal.copyright: Unauthorized reproduction, copying, or mirroring is prohibited.
